opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The moment my foot hits the floor in the morning, a blinding, stabbing pain shoots straight through my heel.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe stabbing heel pain on my first morning steps has flared and I can barely walk on it.

symptom_narrative.onset: 2 weeks, worse over 48h after unsupportive shoes
symptom_narrative.character: sharp stabbing plantar heel pain, worst first thing
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst on first morning steps, eases with activity, worse again after prolonged standing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: first steps, barefoot on hard floors, prolonged standing
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: tight calf; NO numbness/tingling, no radiating pain, no night/rest pain

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; hard wooden/tiled floors; recent unsupportive footwear

objective_data_offered.value: tender right underside of the heel, worst point at the front-inner heel; no swelling/bruising, visible on video
pain worst on first steps, eases with walking, worse after standing
